title: Do I need a new Monday account for a new group of people I work with?
excerpt: I do freelance architectural work and am with a firm using Monday. I’d like to setup a separate Monday for another group of people I work with and all projects, boards, insights etc need to be separate. How do I do this? …

posts.author: skyeg3 (skyeg3)
posts.cookedHtml: I do freelance architectural work and am with a firm using Monday. I’d like to setup a separate Monday for another group of people I work with and all projects, boards, insights etc need to be separate. How do I do this?

posts.author: Lisaann (Lisaann)
posts.cookedHtml: New Here I want to know more about that.

posts.author: Bray865 (Bray865)
posts.cookedHtml: Loved the way you explained everything in this blog.

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @skyeg3

It sounds like you just need to set up a new monday.com account for the other group.

You can create separate workspaces and utilize workspace permission settings to control who sees what in each workspace, but the cleanest way to separate two teams with different objectives like this is by setting up a new monday.com acount.

I’d be happy to keep talking about this if you need to bounce ideas off of someone. Just let me know

Tanner
tanner@elevateops.io
